subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-05 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Just as the created things of this world are infinite, so as a necessity the Essence of God must also be infinite. We confess that we do not know the essence of electricity and ether
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @creation of the world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality
